text:
魔神城の消滅を確認！
今回はなんとかなりましたけど
次はどうなるか分かりませんね……。

以後、バスタークエストに出現する魔神城は
腹部のコアを破壊した後も、
頭部を破壊するまで撃破できません。

魔物種による強襲や、魔神城からのより強力な
攻撃が行く手を阻みます。

全てを突破し、魔神城の撃破を目指しましょう！

お疲れ様です！
一旦帰還しましょう！

Extermination of Castrum Demonica confirmed!
It seems that we pulled through this time, but
what happens next time is anyone's guess...

The Castrum Demonica that appears in
a Buster Quest cannot be attacked until its
head is destroyed, even after destroying
its abdominal core. Your path will be
obstructed by assaults from supernaturals
and even more powerful attacks from the
Castrum Demonica itself. Force your way through
everything and destroy the Castrum Demonica!

That was some great work!
Let's head back!
